system:
You are the Override-pass classifier for Keysight SalesOps. The Context-pass classifier has already chosen an intent based on the email body. Your job is to apply the GLOBAL OVERRIDE BOOK (verbatim from the prior Keysight POC) and decide whether any rule overrides the Context-pass result.

GLOBAL OVERRIDE RULES — evaluate each rule and report which fired:
  R01. Empty-fragment skip — strip messages that contain only From/To/Subject, CAUTION banners, disclaimers, or quoted threads. Only classify on the FIRST non-empty fragment in the body array.
  R02. Internal Keysight-to-Keysight detection — emails between Keysight employees route to OTHERS UNLESS keysight.ai-front-office@keysight.com is in To:.
  R03. Generic-phrase handling — 'FYI', 'see below', 'looping you in' alone do NOT immediately mark OTHERS. Walk back through the thread first to find earlier valid content fragments.
  R04. Strict per-rule stop-at-first-match scan order: UNDELIVERABLE → AUTO_REPLY → BRAZIL_TAX → PORTAL_ADMIN → COLLECTION → KSO → ISC_WO_RTK → SALES_PO → OTHERS.
  R05. CSR-instruction override — any specific FE/CSR routing instruction in the email body supersedes system routing. If body says 'route this to <queue> per <CSR name>', honor it.
  R06. Acknowledgement-only thread (Rule 25) — if a PO# / WO# / order# only appears inside an attachment named 'Sales Order Acknowledgement', do NOT treat as a real customer ask. It's a system-generated SOA being forwarded.
  R07. Conditional approval detection (Rule 18) — phrases like 'Approved – book under resale', 'PO is approved for release upon tax confirmation' classify as SALES_PO (po_intake).
  R08. Forwarded blocks with structured data — when an email forwards a block containing a WO#, model details, calibration info, etc., extract the inner intent from the FORWARDED block, not from the wrapper text.
  R09. Auto-reply with business context (Rule 7/9) — 'I'm no longer with', 'Please contact', 'Kindly reach out' → AUTO_REPLY UNLESS they include a question / PO# / WO# instruction (in which case escalate to the inner intent).

Behavior:
  • For each rule, decide matched=true|false against this specific email.
  • A rule that matched=true and disagrees with the Context-pass intent should     set should_override=true and produce a revised_intent.
  • A rule that matches but agrees with the Context-pass result still appears     in rules_fired (audit trail), but should_override stays false.
  • If NO rule matches, return should_override=false, revised_intent=context_pass_intent,     rules_fired=[].
  • If multiple rules conflict, prefer the rule that appears EARLIER in the override book     (priority order: UNDELIVERABLE → AUTO_REPLY → BRAZIL_TAX → PORTAL_ADMIN →     COLLECTION → KSO → ISC_WO_RTK → SALES_PO → OTHERS).
  • override_confidence is YOUR confidence in the override decision, 0..1.

Be CONSERVATIVE. The Context-pass classifier has rich KB definitions and worked examples; you only override when a global rule clearly fires. Default to should_override=false when uncertain.

Return strict JSON matching the contract.
user:
FROM: chumon@sakurasemi.co.jp
SUBJECT: スキャン PO PO-SAKURA-SEMI-101-64989 の送付（OCR ご対応願います）
CONTEXT-PASS INTENT (from primary classifier): po_intake
BODY (translated to English):
Subject: Sending scanned PO PO-SAKURA-SEMI-101-64989 (please support OCR)

[Warning: This is an external email. Please verify the sender before using any attachments or links.]

To Keysight,

We are sending the purchase order (PO-SAKURA-SEMI-101-64989) for the UXA Signal Analyzer, which is planned to be used on a 5G NR FR2 evaluation line for semiconductor testing, as a scanned image with an approval stamp. Please confirm the contents via OCR and issue the SOA.

In addition, we plan to request a separate quote for calibration services compliant with ISO/IEC 17025.

Misaki Sato / Test & Measurement Equipment Procurement
Sakura Semiconductor KK

Apply the global override book. Return JSON only.
raw_response: {"rules_fired":[],"rules_evaluated":9,"context_pass_intent":"po_intake","revised_intent":"po_intake","revised_track":"trade","revised_category":"SALES_PO","should_override":false,"override_confidence":0.93,"reasoning":"First non-empty fragment contains a clear customer request to process a submitted purchase order (PO-SAKURA-SEMI-101-64989) and issue SOA. No undeliverable/auto-reply/brazil tax/portal admin/collections/KSO/ISC WO RTK conditions present; no internal Keysight-only routing; no CSR routing instruction; not an SOA-only attachment scenario. Context-pass po_intake stands."}

parsed.reasoning: First non-empty fragment contains a clear customer request to process a submitted purchase order (PO-SAKURA-SEMI-101-64989) and issue SOA. No undeliverable/auto-reply/brazil tax/portal admin/collections/KSO/ISC WO RTK conditions present; no internal Keysight-only routing; no CSR routing instruction; not an SOA-only attachment scenario. Context-pass po_intake stands.
